info.value: Let's take a look at the ancient forests in Canada today. People are really worried about their conditions and want to save them. Many tourists visit these forests, but some use knives to carve their names on old trees. Although there are litter bins, people still throw rubbish into the streams. This hurts plants and fish. Local villagers help clean up the forests. We hope tourists will play their part in keeping Canada's forests clean too! Together, we can keep these ancient forests healthy for many more years.
